---
title: "AS92005 Website Exemplar"
---

## Purpose

This site is a complete example of how a Year 11 student can **pass AS92005** using Quarto and R while still having a clear pathway to **Merit/Excellence**.

The project theme is **environmental data in Aotearoa New Zealand** (air quality, rainfall, and river nitrate trends).

## What this project demonstrates

- A multi-page digital outcome built for a specific purpose and audience.
- Clear planning and staged development over one school term.
- Functional website navigation and readable layout.
- Integration of computational content using R code chunks.
- Testing, iteration, and reflection evidence.

## Environmental project context

Students investigate a local or national environmental question, for example:

- How does rainfall change across the year?
- Are PM2.5 air-quality readings higher in some months?
- Is there a relationship between rainfall and river nitrate concentration?

This exemplar includes a starter dataset in `data/environment_nz.csv`.

## Standard alignment (plain language)

To pass AS92005, students should show that they can:

1. Develop a digital outcome that works for users.
2. Use planning and development practices to build it.
3. Test and improve the outcome.
4. Explain choices and evaluate the final result.

Use this website as a model, then adapt topic and content to suit your own class context.

## Unit plan table (with lesson links)

| Week | Lessons | Focus | Lesson Plan |
|---|---:|---|---|
| Week 1 | 1–3 | Paradigm shift: HTML to Markdown | [week-01.md](lessons/week-01.md) |
| Week 2 | 4–6 | Quarto website structure + styling | [week-02.md](lessons/week-02.md) |
| Week 3 | 7–9 | Intro R chunks + loading/displaying data | [week-03.md](lessons/week-03.md) |
| Week 4 | 10–12 | Visualisation + mini-project integration | [week-04.md](lessons/week-04.md) |
| Week 5 | 13–15 | Assessment planning and design | [week-05.md](lessons/week-05.md) |
| Week 6 | 16–18 | Development Sprint 1 workshops | [week-06.md](lessons/week-06.md) |
| Week 7 | 19–21 | Development Sprint 2 workshops | [week-07.md](lessons/week-07.md) |
| Week 8 | 22–24 | Development Sprint 3 workshops | [week-08.md](lessons/week-08.md) |
| Week 9 | 25–27 | Peer trialling and refinement | [week-09.md](lessons/week-09.md) |
| Week 10 | 28–30 | Final render, publish, submit | [week-10.md](lessons/week-10.md) |

Full lesson index: [Lessons page](lessons.qmd)
